chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.297 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A. No.4760/2025 3. For hearing of main case ------------------------- 13.02.2026 Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. -------------------------------- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on 28.03.2025. Absence of applicant as well as his counsel reflects that they have lost interest to pursue this application, which is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution, along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
